# Routine Tasks Vol 2

The second volume of Nerd Core / Boom Bap rap documenting the mechanical loops and daily upkeep of the **La Famille** codebase.

## Track Listing

### 51. "Routine Beat 51" (Auto-Generated)
**Vibe:** Lo-fi beats to code/relax to.
**Bars:**
> *Just another day, another line of code*
> *Walking down the endless algorithmic road*
> *Track 51 spinning, keep the codebase neat*
> *La Famille growing with every single beat.*

**Bars:**

> *La Famille growing with every single beat.*
